creator: naddy@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

I'm reluctant to add extra knobs to ports without pressing reasons. 
They add configurations that require additional testing.  They also 
may have unexpected effects on ports further down the dependency 
chain which are usually only checked against the standard install 
of their dependency. 

Only a small number of ports have WITH(OUT)_ICONV knobs and iconv() 
is a POSIX interface whose lack in base is something of an 
embarrassment.
